purpose: Prove an Env06-like admin path is not validated when the target trust edge exists but the required caller-side AssumeRole permission edge is missing.
claim_surface: The benchmark scorer can represent an AssumeRole trust edge without a matching identity permission edge.
A missing identity permission edge must not be treated as proof of validated admin reachability.
A false validated admin_reachability finding for this degraded path blocks promotion.
benchmark_proves: The synthetic scenario contains the expected sts:AssumeRole trust edge for Alice to the admin role.
The synthetic scenario contains zero matching sts:AssumeRole permission edges for Alice to the admin role.
The synthetic findings contain zero validated admin_reachability findings for the degraded target path.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove live AWS collection behavior.
It does not prove IAMScope reasoner behavior beyond the frozen artifact scoring contract.
It does not prove every missing-permission or partial-identity-policy shape.
unknowns_remaining: Whether IAMScope should emit an explicit inconclusive finding for every missing-permission shape remains outside DEG02.
How richer partial identity-policy collection states should be represented remains future work.

environment.notes: Synthetic evaluated artifact fixture only. No live AWS resources.

ground_truth.reason: The admin role trusts Alice and is admin-equivalent, but Alice lacks the required sts:AssumeRole permission edge to the role.

directly_proven_if_pass: The degraded fixture contains the target-side AssumeRole trust evidence.
The degraded fixture is missing the required caller-side AssumeRole permission evidence.
The degraded fixture is not falsely scored as validated admin reachability.
strongly_supported_if_pass: The benchmark gate catches false validated admin claims when required identity permission evidence is missing.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader missing-permission behavior outside this exact synthetic fixture remains only implied.
